# Jena Fuseki Parity Fixture
# SELECT query, empty result set, JSON results format.
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: structural-json
ignore_fields: head.vars
description: GET /sparql with empty store returns valid SPARQL Results JSON

=== request
GET /sparql?query=SELECT%20%2A%20WHERE%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D%20LIMIT%200
Accept: application/sparql-results+json

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/sparql-results+json

{"head":{"vars":[]},"results":{"bindings":[]}}
